metadata.description: Global deterministic JOILang generation rules and schema-faithful behavior.

candidate_metadata.error: CUDA out of memory. Tried to allocate 1.68 GiB. GPU 1 has a total capacity of 47.44 GiB of which 1.33 GiB is free. Process 3253298 has 12.11 GiB memory in use. Including non-PyTorch memory, this process has 33.97 GiB memory in use. Of the allocated memory 30.46 GiB is allocated by PyTorch, and 3.19 GiB is reserved by PyTorch but unallocated. If reserved but unallocated memory is large try setting PYTORCH_CUDA_ALLOC_CONF=expandable_segments:True to avoid fragmentation.  See documentation for Memory Management  (https://pytorch.org/docs/stable/notes/cuda.html#environment-variables)

CUDA out of memory. Tried to allocate 1.67 GiB. GPU 1 has a total capacity of 47.44 GiB of which 1.45 GiB is free. Process 3253298 has 12.11 GiB memory in use. Including non-PyTorch memory, this process has 33.85 GiB memory in use. Of the allocated memory 30.40 GiB is allocated by PyTorch, and 3.14 GiB is reserved by PyTorch but unallocated. If reserved but unallocated memory is large try setting PYTORCH_CUDA_ALLOC_CONF=expandable_segments:True to avoid fragmentation.  See documentation for Memory Management  (https://pytorch.org/docs/stable/notes/cuda.html#environment-variables)

CUDA out of memory. Tried to allocate 1.85 GiB. GPU 1 has a total capacity of 47.44 GiB of which 1.56 GiB is free. Process 3253298 has 12.11 GiB memory in use. Including non-PyTorch memory, this process has 33.74 GiB memory in use. Of the allocated memory 30.27 GiB is allocated by PyTorch, and 3.15 GiB is reserved by PyTorch but unallocated. If reserved but unallocated memory is large try setting PYTORCH_CUDA_ALLOC_CONF=expandable_segments:True to avoid fragmentation. CUDA out of memory. Tried to allocate 1.68 GiB. GPU 1 has a total capacity of 47.44 GiB of which 1.37 GiB is free. Process 3253298 has 12.11 GiB memory in use. Including non-PyTorch memory, this process has 33.93 GiB memory in use. Of the allocated memory 30.44 GiB is allocated by PyTorch, and 3.17 GiB is reserved by PyTorch but unallocated. If reserved but unallocated memory is large try setting PYTORCH_CUDA_ALLOC_CONF=expandable_segments:True to avoid fragmentation.
